title: citrus × amblycarpa
intro: Citrus × amblycarpa, also known as the Australian round lime or fingered lime, is a hybrid citrus species native to the tropical regions of Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Citrus × amblycarpa include its ability to support digestive health, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. Citrus × amblycarpa can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
